name: circuit-agent-cloud
description: Decentralized CPU hosting for Circuit agents — control plane, off-box signer (custody), node-host, and a reference agent workload

scripts.test: node test/crypto-check.mjs && node test/node-host-env.test.mjs && node test/ssrf.test.mjs && node test/bundle.test.mjs && node test/bundle-binding.test.mjs && node test/owner-auth.test.mjs && node test/node-auth.test.mjs && node test/egress-proxy.test.mjs && node test/sandbox-gating.test.mjs && node test/withdraw.test.mjs && node test/verified-intent.test.mjs && node test/verified-provision.mjs && node test/withdraw-e2e.test.mjs && node test/e2e-signer.mjs
